refnamediv.refpurpose: Keep connected components within an area range.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: bwout = imbwareafilt(image, areaRange); bwout = imbwareafilt(image, areaRange, connectivity)

listitem.para: A positive minimum area or inclusive [min max] range.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imbwareafilt measures connected components and retains those whose pixel areas fall within the requested range.

refsection.title: Examples
